# terrible_ovirt_ovirt_ovirt_storage_connection (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `address` (String) Address of the storage server. E.g.: myserver.mydomain.com
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `force` (Boolean) This parameter is relevant only when updating a connection. If *true* the storage domain don't have to be in *MAINTENANCE* state, so the storage connection is updated.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `mount_options` (String) Option which will be passed when mounting storage.
- `nfs_retrans` (Number) The number of times to retry a request before attempting further recovery actions. Range 0 to 65535.
- `nfs_timeout` (Number) The time in tenths of a second to wait for a response before retrying NFS requests. Range 0 to 65535.
- `nfs_version` (String) NFS version. One of: *auto*, *v3*, *v4* or *v4_1*.
- `password` (String) A CHAP password for logging into a target.
- `path` (String) Path of the mount point of the storage. E.g.: /path/to/my/data
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port` (Number) Port of the iSCSI storage server.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Should the storage connection be present or absent.
- `storage` (String) Name of the storage domain to be used with storage connection.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `target` (String) The target IQN for the storage device.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) Storage type. For example: *nfs*, *iscsi*, etc.
- `username` (String) A CHAP username for logging into a target.
- `vfs_type` (String) Virtual File System type.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `storage_connection` (String) Dictionary of all the storage connection attributes. Storage connection attributes can be found on your oVirt instance at following url: https://ovirt.example.com/ovirt-engine/api/model#types/storage_connection.
